member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy
member.summary: Policy applied when a message handler fails during processing. Use the static factory methods to create instances.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.Type
member.summary: The type of error handling strategy.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts. Used when is .

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.RetryDelay
member.summary: Initial delay between retry attempts.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.RetryBackoffMultiplier
member.summary: Multiplier applied to the retry delay for exponential backoff.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.DeadLetterDestination
member.summary: Destination for dead-lettered messages. Used when is .

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.Retry(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a retry error strategy with exponential backoff.
member.param: Maximum number of retry attempts.
Initial delay between retries. Defaults to 1 second.
Backoff multiplier. Defaults to 2.0.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.DeadLetter(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a dead-letter error strategy that forwards failed messages to a designated destination.
member.param: The destination to forward dead-lettered messages to.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategy.Reject
member.summary: Creates a reject error strategy that discards and logs failed messages.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategyType
member.summary: The type of error handling strategy.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategyType.Retry
member.summary: Retry the message handler with exponential backoff.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategyType.DeadLetter
member.summary: Forward the message to a dead-letter destination.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.ErrorStrategyType.Reject
member.summary: Reject the message (no requeue) and log the failure.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.HealthCheckResult
member.summary: Result of a health check query on the active transport connection.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.HealthCheckResult.IsHealthy
member.summary: Whether the transport connection is currently healthy.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.HealthCheckResult.TransportName
member.summary: Name of the transport being checked.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.HealthCheckResult.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of the health status.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.HealthCheckResult.Data
member.summary: Additional health check data.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.HealthCheckResult.TransportEntries
member.summary: Per-transport health entries for multi-transport configurations.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBus
member.summary: Top-level facade combining publish, subscribe, and lifecycle management. Registered as a singleton in DI. Consumers interact with this interface only.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBus.PublishAsync``1(System.String,``0,Messaggero.Abstractions.MessagePublishOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a message to the specified destination.
member.typeparam: The type of the message payload.
member.param: The target destination name.
The message payload to publish.
Optional publish options (routing key, headers, correlation ID).
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBus.SubscribeAsync``1(System.String,System.String,Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageHandler{``0},Messaggero.Abstractions.SubscriptionOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribes to messages on the specified destination.
member.typeparam: The type of the message payload.
member.param: The source destination name.
The consumer group identifier.
The message handler to process incoming messages.
Optional subscription options (concurrency, error strategy).
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A handle that can be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBus.CheckHealthAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queries the health of the active transport connection.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A health check result indicating the connection status.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBus.OnLifecycleEvent(System.Action{Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent})
member.summary: Registers a listener for lifecycle events.
member.param: The callback to invoke when a lifecycle event occurs.
member.returns: A disposable that, when disposed, removes the listener.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport
member.summary: Transport implementation interface. Implemented by transport packages (e.g., Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ). Not consumed directly by application code.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport.Name
member.summary: The name of this transport (e.g., "RabbitMQ", "Kafka").

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Establishes a connection to the message broker.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gracefully disconnects from the message broker.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport.PublishAsync(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a serialized message to the specified destination.
member.param: The target destination (topic/exchange).
The serialized message body.
Wire-level metadata for the message.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.summary: Subscribes to messages from the specified destination.
member.param: The source destination (topic/queue).
The consumer group identifier.
A callback invoked for each received message.
Subscription configuration options.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A subscription handle that can be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport.CheckHealthAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks the health of the transport connection.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A health check result indicating the connection status.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport.OnLifecycleEvent(System.Action{Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent})
member.summary: Registers a listener for lifecycle events emitted by this transport.
member.param: The callback to invoke when a lifecycle event occurs.
member.returns: A disposable that, when disposed, removes the listener.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageHandler`1
member.summary: Implemented by consumers to process incoming messages.
member.typeparam: The type of the message payload.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageHandler`1.HandleAsync(Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an incoming message envelope.
member.param: The message envelope containing the deserialized payload and metadata.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the message has been processed.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer
member.summary: Pluggable serialization contract for message payloads.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer.ContentType
member.summary: The content type this serializer produces (e.g., "application/json").

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer.Serialize``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes a value to a byte array.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to serialize.
member.param: The value to serialize.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer.Deserialize``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Deserializes a byte span to a value.
member.param: The byte span to deserialize.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.ISubscriptionHandle
member.summary: Handle returned from a subscription that can be used to unsubscribe.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ISubscriptionHandle.Destination
member.summary: The destination this subscription is listening on.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ISubscriptionHandle.GroupId
member.summary: The consumer group identifier for this subscription.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ISubscriptionHandle.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the subscription is currently active and receiving messages.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.ITransportSubscription
member.summary: Transport-level subscription handle. Used internally by the core orchestrator.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ITransportSubscription.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the transport subscription is currently active.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent
member.summary: Structured notification emitted by the library at key moments for observability.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.EventType
member.summary: The type of lifecycle event.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: When the event occurred.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.TransportName
member.summary: Name of the transport that emitted the event.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.Destination
member.summary: The relevant destination, if applicable.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.MessageId
member.summary: The relevant message ID, if applicable.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.Error
member.summary: Error details, if applicable.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEvent.Metadata
member.summary: Additional context metadata.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType
member.summary: Types of lifecycle events emitted by the messaging library.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.TransportConnected
member.summary: Transport successfully connected to the broker.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.TransportDisconnected
member.summary: Transport disconnected from the broker.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.TransportReconnecting
member.summary: Transport is attempting to reconnect to the broker.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.TransportFailed
member.summary: Transport has exhausted all reconnection attempts.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.MessagePublished
member.summary: A message was successfully published.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.MessageReceived
member.summary: A message was received from the broker.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Abstractions.LifecycleEventType.MessageError
member.summary: An error occurred during message processing.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1
member.summary: Transport-agnostic container for a single message delivered to handlers.
member.typeparam: The type of the message payload.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.MessageId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the message (UUID v7 recommended for time-ordering).

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.Payload
member.summary: Deserialized message body.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.Destination
member.summary: Logical destination name (topic/queue).

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.Headers
member.summary: Key-value metadata headers (may be empty).

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.RoutingKey
member.summary: Routing/partition key; determines ordering scope. Null means no ordering guarantee.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.Timestamp
member.summary: When the message was created.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.ContentType
member.summary: Serialization format (e.g., "application/json").

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageEnvelope`1.CorrelationId
member.summary: For request-reply and tracing correlation.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata
member.summary: Wire-level metadata passed between core and transport layer. Not exposed to consumers directly.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata.MessageId
member.summary: Unique message identifier.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata.RoutingKey
member.summary: Routing/partition key for ordering.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata.Headers
member.summary: Key-value metadata headers.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata.Timestamp
member.summary: When the message was created.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata.ContentType
member.summary: Serialization content type (e.g., "application/json").

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata.CorrelationId
member.summary: For request-reply and tracing correlation.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessagePublishOptions
member.summary: Options for publishing a message.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessagePublishOptions.RoutingKey
member.summary: Routing/partition key for message ordering.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessagePublishOptions.Headers
member.summary: Additional headers to include with the message.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.MessagePublishOptions.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation identifier for request-reply patterns and tracing.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions
member.summary: Configuration for exponential backoff reconnection behavior.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions.InitialDelay
member.summary: Initial delay before the first reconnection attempt. Must be greater than zero.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions.Multiplier
member.summary: Multiplier applied to the delay after each failed reconnection attempt. Must be ≥ 1.0.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions.MaxDelay
member.summary: Maximum delay between reconnection attempts. Must be ≥ .

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions.MaxAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of reconnection attempts. 0 means unlimited.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions.Validate
member.summary: Validates the reconnection options and throws if any values are invalid.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.SubscriptionOptions
member.summary: Configuration for a single subscription.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.SubscriptionOptions.MaxConcurrency
member.summary: Maximum number of messages processed concurrently for this subscription. Default is 1 (sequential processing). Per-key ordering is preserved regardless.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.SubscriptionOptions.ErrorStrategy
member.summary: Error-handling policy applied when a message handler fails.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.SubscriptionOptions.PrefetchCount
member.summary: Broker-level prefetch count. Defaults to if not set. Must be greater than or equal to .

member.name: T:Messaggero.Abstractions.TransportHealthEntry
member.summary: Health status for a single registered transport.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.TransportHealthEntry.TransportName
member.summary: Name of the transport being reported on.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.TransportHealthEntry.IsHealthy
member.summary: Whether the transport connection is currently healthy.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Abstractions.TransportHealthEntry.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of the transport health status.
